message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant JobManager
boundary Nodes
boundary ESDM
participant "Post Processing Library" as PPL
database Storage

User -> JobManager : submit job(IN, OUT)
JobManager -> Nodes

box "Initialization"
end box

Nodes -> Storage : read IN=x
Storage -> Nodes : return

box "Loop"
end box

Nodes -> Nodes : compute
Nodes -> ESDM : write async OUT=y
ESDM -> Storage : write snapshot (async)
ESDM -> PPL : trigger post processing if region effected

box "In Situ Post Processing"
end box

PPL -> PPL : perform post processing
note right of PPL : (could write result directly)
PPL -> ESDM : return
ESDM -> Storage : write post processing result
ESDM -> Nodes : return
Nodes -> JobManager : OUT files become visible

note over ESDM : multiple iterations

box "Finalize"
end box

JobManager -> User : All OUT files become visible to subsequent users.

@enduml
